name: ty-project-curabot
description: Deployment helper scripts for the CURABOT monorepo

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix Backend && npm install --prefix Frontend && npm run build --prefix Frontend
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env PORT=5001 npm run dev --prefix Backend
scripts.dev:frontend: cross-env PORT=3001 BROWSER=none REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:5001/api REACT_APP_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:5001 npm run dev --prefix Frontend
